## Description

Describe the changes in this PR. What problem does it solve or what feature does it add?

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (no code changes)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change that is neither a fix nor a feature)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test (adding or updating tests)
- [ ] 🔧 Chore (build, CI, tooling changes)

## Related Issues

Closes #(issue number) or Links to any related discussions/issues

## Testing

How have you tested these changes? Include steps to reproduce if applicable.

- [ ] Added/updated unit tests
- [ ] Tested with TypeScript strict mode
- [ ] Verified bundle size impact (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested against Node 18+

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (README, ARCHITECTURE, etc.)
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix/feature works
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass
- [ ] I have not introduced any new runtime dependencies
- [ ] The commit message follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](docs/CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)

## Breaking changes

Is this a breaking change? If yes, please describe the migration path:

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or information here.
